author: doll-agent
content:
Done. FromArrow::into_ferray(self) consumed the Arrow array even though the impl always copied the buffer into a fresh Vec. Callers had to clone before conversion to keep the source.

Switched to FromArrow::to_ferray(&self) and FromArrowBool::to_ferray_bool(&self). Old methods kept as deprecated default-impl forwarders.

2 new tests prove the borrow form lets callers reuse the Arrow array.

ferray-numpy-interop: 78 -> 80 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit a1d25f59.
